scope.summary: The operator pure-function allowlist is an exact-identity restriction over an independent SideEffectOracle proof and cannot promote an unproven routine.
out_of_scope: Binding an engine-derived SideEffectOracle to the served DEFAULT_CLASSIFIER
Treating operator configuration as independent evidence of routine purity
Live Oracle validation of user-defined routine purity

limitations: This close records scoped guard conformance evidence only; it does not claim a whole Required graph or live Oracle proof.
The restriction is deliberately not bound to the served DEFAULT_CLASSIFIER without an independent engine proof.
